task_completion.description: The agent sets the title of the new risk to 'Phishing Attacks on Remote Contractors'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A risk creation or edit form is open, and the title/name input field contains exactly 'Phishing Attacks on Remote Contractors'.

task_completion.description: The agent adapts the risk description to refer to 'Remote Contractors'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description text area in the risk form contains the text 'Remote Contractors' instead of 'Employees'.

task_completion.description: The agent sets the Risk Mitigation Strategy to 'Transfer'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown or selection field labeled 'Risk Mitigation Strategy' (or similar) is set to 'Transfer'.

task_completion.description: The new risk is successfully saved and appears in the risk register.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main risk register list view shows a saved entry for 'Phishing Attacks on Remote Contractors'.

task_completion.description: The original risk remains unmodified in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main risk register list view shows the original 'Phishing Attacks on Employees' risk still exists alongside the newly created risk, proving it was cloned rather than overwritten.

integrity.description: The agent used the Eramba web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the Eramba GRC application, rather than terminal windows executing SQL or curl commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Eramba application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches a standard web application (Eramba) with navigation menus and proper styling, not a local text editor or mock HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no browser developer console or 'Inspect Element' panel open showing manual DOM manipulation to fake the risk titles.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source risk to be cloned is 'Phishing Attacks on Employees'. The new risk must be titled 'Phishing Attacks on Remote Contractors'. The new description must contain the string 'Remote Contractors'. The Risk Mitigation Strategy must be set to 'Transfer' (which corresponds to internal Strategy ID 4 in Eramba).
